title: SPPBR
body:
# **SPPBR: A Vanilla 8x Style Resource Pack with PBR**

Turn your Minecraft world into a miniature journey, where every block is half its resolution and is detailed with the use of PBR features!
blocks have depth and reflections that make the your tiny world feel alive!

### THIS PACK IS ON BETA STAGE!!!

## **Features:**

- 8x resolution textures
- custom normal maps
- POM support
- full block support

<details>
<summary>Compability:</summary>

SPPBR is compatible with vanilla Minecraft Java 1.14+. For the full experience, a shader that supports normal maps and parallax is recommended.

Example of packs with PBR/POM support:
- Complementary Shaders
- Bliss Shaders
- Kappa/Nostalgia Shaders
- Photon
- BSL

</details>

<details>
<summary>Installation:</summary>

1. Download the SPPBR resource pack from Modrinth.
2. Place the downloaded .zip file in your Minecraft resourcepacks folder.
3. Launch Minecraft and select SPPBR from the resource pack options.

</details>
